title: Jharkhand JSSC JILCCE Inter Level Recruitment 2026 Government Jobs in India Apply Now
excerpt: Jharkhand Staff Selection Commission (JSSC) has released the notification for JSSC JILCCE Inter Level Recruitment 2026. Interested candidates can apply online from 20/07/2026 to 19/08/2026. Total 326 posts are available.

About Organization

Jharkhand Staff Selection Commission (JSSC) is a government organization responsible for conducting recruitment exams for various government jobs in Jharkhand.

As per official notification, JSSC has released the notification for JSSC JILCCE Inter Level Recruitment 2026.

About the Programme

The JSSC JILCCE Inter Level Recruitment 2026 is a government job recruitment program conducted by JSSC.

The program aims to recruit eligible candidates for various government jobs in Jharkhand.
